data.label: Elkos Shade Ball pen
data.description:
The Elkos Pens Shade Ball Pen is a budget-friendly, smooth-writing ball pen commonly used by students.
Smooth and soft writing (less finger strain)
Lightweight and easy to hold
Attractive pastel body colors (around 7 shades)
Suitable for:
Exams
Daily writing
Office use

data.label: Vicks
data.description: Vicks is a very popular brand used for cold, cough, and congestion relief.
